commit.message:
docs: add planning docs and update progress

Add component audit, refactoring plan, and theme study documents.
Remove unused frontend container from docker-compose (runs locally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restore hover magnify with smart origin; light grey card thumbnail bg

- Hover scale 1.85x restored on all cards
- Smart transform-origin: JS sets left/center/right top based on card
  position in viewport — left-edge cards expand rightward, right-edge
  cards expand leftward, no more viewport clipping
- card-thumb background: #c8c8c8 (light grey) — letterbox/pillarbox
  areas around contain-scaled images are now visible instead of black

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement IndexNow for instant Bing ecosystem indexing

- Add verification key file in /public
- Add API route at /api/indexnow to submit URLs
- Add GitHub Actions workflow to auto-submit sitemap on push to main

Reminder: add INDEXNOW_API_KEY to Vercel environment variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Change formula divisor from 1.8 to 1.88

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: student note editing in dashboard + data reliability improvements

- Student can now edit/update their note from the dashboard panel
- Note is saved to reservations/{uid}.note and reflected in admin panel
- Firestore rule: student can only update 'note' field on their own reservation
- Auto-migration now runs once per session using batch writes instead of N individual writes
- All delete/write ops now have .catch() error handlers
- Notification cleanup uses batch.commit() instead of per-doc deletes
- Forum post delete handles >400 replies via chunked batching
- Added .limit() guards: reservations(200), forum(2000), replies(5000), follows(500)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Anthropic built-in text_editor with custom provider-agnostic tool

Remove dependency on Anthropic's text_editor_20250728 built-in tool and
createAnthropicProviderForAgent(). The agent pipeline now uses a custom
text_editor tool definition with zodSchema() and createProviderModel(),
making it work with any LLM provider (Bedrock, OpenAI, etc.) without
requiring an Anthropic API key fallback.

Tested end-to-end with Bedrock Sonnet on both chat and workbench pipelines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(auth): route password reset through /auth/callback (#117) (#117)

The reset email was never sent because redirectTo pointed to
/auth/reset-password which is likely not in Supabase's allowed
redirect URLs. Signup uses /auth/callback (which IS whitelisted).

Changes:
- redirectTo now uses /auth/callback?next=/auth/reset-password
- callback route reads ?next= and redirects to reset-password
  after successful code exchange (hardcoded allowlist: only
  /auth/reset-password accepted)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add per-glyph entrance animations to embeddable widget

Port all 16 unique entrance animations from the main GlyphClock to the
widget, with gc- prefixed keyframes to avoid host page conflicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix freeze: blur everything EXCEPT the chessboard

The freeze overlay now covers the full screen (position: fixed, z-index: 50)
with backdrop-filter: blur(7px) and radial vignetting (dark edges, clear center).
The chessboard gets z-index: 60 during freeze so it emerges sharp and unblurred
above the overlay — the board is the focal point, everything else fades out.
Timer and text appear below the board, outside the blur zone.

commit.message:
Fix U-Net inference for non-multiple-of-16 image dimensions

- Add pad_to_multiple() with reflect padding in enhance.py and app.py
  Eval images are 1024×737 (H%16=1); the 4 MaxPool layers require H and W
  divisible by 16 or skip connections misalign. Padding is cropped back
  before saving/MSE so no padded pixels appear in output.
- Auto-detect base_filters from checkpoint args in enhance.py
  Checkpoint uses base_filters=16; script previously defaulted to 32.
- Update CLAUDE.md: phase status, eval pair filenames (.jpg not .png)
- Record final eval MSE in project-log.md (avg 0.038925)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Fix End Session button unresponsive on Safari iOS

Two root causes:
1. No visual feedback — SessionSaveProgress is disabled (returns null), so pressing
   End Session showed nothing while async save operations ran for 10-30s on mobile.
   User thought button wasn't working and kept tapping.
2. Scroll-then-tap issue — video recording pushes End Session below the fold on mobile.
   First tap after scrolling is swallowed by iOS as a scroll-end gesture.

Fixes:
- Add isEndingSession state to RecommendationTTSSession: button immediately shows
  spinner + "Saving session..." on first press and disables to prevent double-tap
- Add touch-manipulation class to all session start/stop/end buttons to defeat
  iOS 300ms tap delay and scroll-then-tap interception
- Fix hardcoded "End Session" text in ElevenLabsAvatarSession (now uses t() key)
- Add translation keys: recommendationTTS.endingSession, session.stopSession (en/ru/it)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make PriceObservation.date optional

Inventory entries don't carry an explicit observation date, so
prices pushed from inventory-md have no date.  The 422 is fixed
by making the field optional (None = date unknown).

feat(scheduling): per-agegroup game guarantee configuration

Add first-class game guarantee storage with two-tier cascade:
agegroup.GameGuarantee ?? job.GameGuarantee ?? null (full RR).

Backend:
- GameGuarantee nullable int on Jobs + Agegroups entities (DB-first scaffold)
- SaveGameGuaranteeRequest/Response DTOs
- Repository methods on IJobRepository + IAgeGroupRepository
- TimeslotService resolves cascade in readiness DTOs
- AutoBuildScheduleService reads stored guarantee with derived fallback
- PUT /api/dev-scheduling/game-guarantee endpoint
- QA check: GetTeamsBelowGuaranteeAsync flags teams under their guarantee

Frontend:
- Editable guarantee badge in event-summary-panel hero
- Inline popover with number input for event-level default
- Build results panel shows teams below guarantee as warning
- Auto-build service wired for save + refresh flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: drop is_template — programs are just programs

The concept of "templates" has been removed entirely. Programs are now
a single flat type. Seeded/read-only content uses is_prebuilt=1.
Any program can be deep-copied via POST /api/v1/programs/{id}/copy.

Changes:
- DB: Add migration 002 to DROP COLUMN is_template from programs
- sqlc: Remove is_template from InsertProgram and GetProgramByUUID queries
- Domain: Remove IsTemplate field from Program struct and DeepCopy
- Store: Replace IsTemplate filter in ProgramListParams with IsPrebuilt;
  update ListPrograms raw query and scan
- DTOs: Remove is_template from CreateProgramRequest, ProgramResponse,
  ProgramTreeResponse and all conversion functions
- Handler: Replace ?is_template query param with ?is_prebuilt
- Tests: Update domain test (DeepCopy), all acceptance feature files
  (programs, cycles, sessions, progress), and program step definitions
- Docs: Update CLAUDE.md, architecture.md, api.md, domain-model.md,
  schema-design.md, implementation-plan.md, phase2-implementation-plan.md,
  project-structure.md, local-development.md, ui-spec.md, ai.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add DELETE /api/v1/sessions/{sid}/sets?exercise_uuid={uuid}

Implements the set-log deletion endpoint for mid-session exercise
substitution cleanup. Deletes all set_logs for a given exercise in a
session; requires the session to be in_progress (returns 422 otherwise).

- SQL: DeleteSetLogsForSessionAndExercise query + make gen
- Store: DeleteSetLogsForExercise — resolves session/exercise by UUID,
  validates status, then deletes
- Handler: HandleDeleteSetsForExercise — reads sid from path param,
  exercise_uuid from query param, returns 204 No Content
- Routes: DELETE /api/v1/sessions/{sid}/sets (top-level, not
  cycle-scoped)
- Acceptance: two new scenarios (happy path + pending session 422)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: fold is_template removal into 001_initial.sql

Nothing is deployed so no runtime migration is needed. Remove
is_template directly from the initial schema and delete the now-
redundant 002_drop_is_template.sql file (which was never wired into
allMigrations anyway).

feat(ui): quick copy-to-clipboard for segments, fields, and raw message (#76)

* feat(ui): quick copy-to-clipboard for segments, fields, and raw message (#63)

Three copy targets in the parsed/raw detail view:
- Segment header: 📋 icon appears on hover, copies raw segment string on click
- Field value cell: entire cell is click-to-copy with green flash feedback
- Raw tab: "📋 Copy All" button at top-right copies the full message text

All targets use navigator.clipboard with toast fallback on error.
Visual feedback uses CSS class toggling (copy-success) with 1.5s / 0.5s
timeouts to avoid disrupting the layout.

repository.name: hl7-forge
repository.description: HL7 Forge is a high-performance HL7 MLLP server and real-time testing tool built in Rust. It features an embedded Web UI that allows multiple developers to receive, inspect, filter, and analyze HL7 v2.x messages simultaneously directly in the browser—eliminating the need for local legacy desktop tools.

commit.message:
docs: restructure milestones — core engine before first render

New M1 focuses entirely on the core engine driven by tests: buffer,
selections, edit operations, motions, text objects, tree-structured
undo, and property-based testing. No UI dependency. First render
moved to M2, modal editing to M3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add Playwright E2E test suite

Setup:
- Install @playwright/test 1.58.2 + Chromium browser
- playwright.config.js: Chromium only, webServer starts local server,
  reuseExistingServer in dev, screenshots on failure

Test suites (22 tests, all passing):

e2e/landing.spec.js — 9 tests
  title, hero headline, CTA href, nav link, no italic elements,
  favicon, value props (scroll-reveal aware), how-it-works section,
  footer copyright + GitHub link

e2e/pricing.spec.js — 8 tests
  title, tier headings, monospace prices, both Start Free hrefs,
  FAQ presence, favicon, nav wordmark href, no italic elements

e2e/app.spec.js — 5 tests
  login screen visible when unauthenticated, sign-in button enabled,
  favicon, health endpoint returns ok, auth/status endpoint reachable

npm scripts: test:e2e, test:e2e:ui, test:e2e:headed, test:e2e:debug

feat: Phase 0 completion — form schema, app shell, offline sync, quality gates (#25)

* harden offline sync/auth flows and expand mobile regression tests

* fix: harden offline sync reliability and parsing

* ci: fix linux workflow restore and maui workload usage

* ci: align workflow project paths with refactored modules

* ci: limit linux validation scope to stable mobile modules

* style: apply whitespace fixes for offline sync engine

* ci: update maui validation matrix to net10 targets

* chore: align mobile projects and templates to net10

* feat: add delta download engine for bidirectional GeoPackage sync

- IReplicaSyncClient + ReplicaSyncClient for server replication endpoints
  (createReplica, extractChanges, synchronizeReplica, unRegisterReplica)
- DeltaDownloadEngine orchestrates download: register replica, extract
  changes, upsert/delete features in local GeoPackage, advance cursor
- IGeoPackageSyncStore extended with feature CRUD (honua_features table)
- BackgroundSyncOrchestrator wired to run download after upload

Part of honua-io/honua-mobile#8.
